perturbation.original_text: You understand and agree that no contract or agreement providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company unless and until you and the Company execute and deliver a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction (a “ Transaction Agreement ”), and you hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: You understand and agree that a preliminary agreement or handshake providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company, prior to the execution and delivery of a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction (a “ Transaction Agreement ”).
perturbation.explanation: This change directly contradicts the original intent of Section 8, which states that no agreement exists until a final definitive agreement is executed. The insertion of 'a preliminary agreement or handshake providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist' creates a contradiction, suggesting that informal agreements are binding before a Transaction Agreement is signed. This is contradicting with the later statement in the same section where it says 'and you hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement.'
perturbation.contradicted_text: You understand and agree that no contract or agreement providing for a Transaction shall be deemed to exist between you and the Company unless and until you and the Company execute and deliver a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction (a “ Transaction Agreement ”), and you hereby waive, in advance, any claims (including, without limitation, breach of contract) relating to the existence of a Transaction unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement. You also agree that, unless and until you and the Company shall have executed and delivered a Transaction Agreement, neither you nor the Company will be under any legal obligation of any kind whatsoever with respect to such Transaction by virtue of this Confidentiality Agreement except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. You further acknowledge and agree that the Company reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to reject any proposals made by you, your Affiliates or any of the Representatives with regard to a Transaction, and to terminate discussion and negotiations with you at any time and for any reason or no reason. You understand that the Company shall be free to establish and change any process or procedure with respect to any possible Transaction as the Company in its sole discretion shall determine (including, without limitation, negotiating with any other interested party and entering into a final definitive agreement relating to a Transaction with any other party without prior notice to you or any other Person).
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original agreement by stating that a 'preliminary agreement or handshake' constitutes a binding agreement, whereas the contradicted text explicitly states that 'no contract or agreement' exists until a 'final definitive agreement' is executed. This alteration introduces a clear contradiction, as it implies that informal agreements hold legal weight, directly opposing the original section's assertion that only the final agreement is binding. The explanation given also correctly states this contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained.
perturbation.changed_text: If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you are not obligated to inform the Company of this decision. However, if you proceed with a Transaction with another party, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained.
perturbation.explanation: The original text required informing the Company of the decision to not proceed. The modified text removes this obligation, creating a conflict regarding the expected conduct if a transaction is abandoned. Furthermore, making informing the company optional is contradicting with the obligation later in the paragraph where it says '...within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained.' since company will not know if they are proceeding with a Transaction so they can request the mentioned.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Return or Destruction of Evaluation Material . If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained. No such termination will affect your obligations hereunder or those of the Representatives. If requested by the Company, you will, and will cause the Representatives to, provide written certification to the Company that all such material (including electronic copies) has been returned or destroyed in compliance with this Confidentiality Agreement. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, you and the Representatives shall continue to be bound by their obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the obligation to inform the Company of the decision not to proceed with a transaction. The contradicted text states 'If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision'. This creates a direct conflict because the changed text makes informing the company optional while the contradicted text makes it mandatory. Furthermore, this change contradicts the later obligation to return Evaluation Material within ten days of the company's request, since the company will not necessarily know when the 10 day deadline starts. Thus, a strong contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: You understand and acknowledge that the Company and its Affiliates and representatives have made and make no representation hereunder, express or implied, as to the accuracy or completeness of the Evaluation Materials, expressly disclaim any and all liability for the information contained in or omitted from the Evaluation Material furnished by or on behalf of the Company and shall have no liability to you, your Affiliates or the Representatives or any other Person relating to or resulting from the use of the Evaluation Material or any errors therein or omissions therefrom.
perturbation.changed_text: You understand and acknowledge that the Company and its Affiliates and representatives guarantee, express or implied, as to the accuracy and completeness of the Evaluation Materials. The Company and its Affiliates shall have liability to you, your Affiliates or the Representatives or any other Person relating to or resulting from the use of the Evaluation Material or any errors therein or omissions therefrom.
perturbation.explanation: The original section 9 explicitly disclaims any representation or warranty regarding the accuracy of the Evaluation Materials. The revised text directly contradicts this by stating that the company *guarantees* the accuracy and completeness of the materials, creating a direct in-text contradiction within the same section and creating a uncertainty on the liability of the company if there is an error with the material shared to another party
perturbation.contradicted_text: No Representations or Warranties; No Obligation to Disclose . You understand and acknowledge that the Company and its Affiliates and representatives have made and make no representation hereunder, express or implied, as to the accuracy or completeness of the Evaluation Materials, expressly disclaim any and all liability for the information contained in or omitted from the Evaluation Material furnished by or on behalf of the Company and shall have no liability to you, your Affiliates or the Representatives or any other Person relating to or resulting from the use of the Evaluation Material or any errors therein or omissions therefrom. The parties agree that the Company will only be liable for any representations or warranties which are made in a Transaction Agreement, when, as, and if executed and delivered, and subject to such limitations and restrictions as may be specified therein. Nothing in this Confidentiality Agreement shall be construed as obligating the Company to provide, or to continue to provide, any information to any Person. It is expected that you will conduct your own independent investigation of the Company and rely upon such investigation in making an investment decision regarding the Company.
perturbation.justification: The original text and contradicted text explicitly disclaim any representation or warranty regarding the accuracy of the Evaluation Materials and deny liability for errors or omissions. The changed text directly contradicts this by stating that the company guarantees the accuracy and completeness of the materials and assumes liability for errors or omissions. This creates a clear and direct contradiction within the same section, rendering the company's liability uncertain.

perturbation.original_text: This Confidentiality Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties hereto regarding the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements, understandings, arrangements and discussions between the parties hereto regarding such subject matter.
perturbation.changed_text: This Confidentiality Agreement does *not* contain the entire agreement between the parties hereto regarding the subject matter hereof and does *not* supersede all prior agreements, understandings, arrangements and discussions between the parties hereto regarding such subject matter.
perturbation.explanation: This section originally intended that any previous contract or arrangements between parties should be replaced with the terms stated in this one, making it the main agreement between the parties. However, contradicting the sentence makes it the opposite and makes the parties uncertain on which agreement/contract they should follow in the current situation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Confidentiality Agreement contains the entire agreement between the parties hereto regarding the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements, understandings, arrangements and discussions between the parties hereto regarding such subject matter. If you are in agreement with the foregoing, please sign and return one copy of this Confidentiality Agreement, it being understood that all counterpart copies will constitute but one agreement with respect to the subject matter hereof. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above. “Company” “Other Party” DAEGIS, INC. OPEN TEXT CORPORATION By: /s/ Timothy P. Bacci By: /s/ Gordon Davies Name: Timothy P. Bacci Name: Gordon Davies Title: President & CEO Title: CLO and Corporate Secretary
perturbation.justification: The changed text negates the original text, which also appears in the contradicted text. The original text states that the agreement is the 'entire agreement' and supersedes all prior agreements. The changed text explicitly states the opposite, creating a direct and irreconcilable conflict. This uncertainty makes it unclear which agreements should be followed, leading to a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof and be governed by Texas law.
perturbation.changed_text: Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate immediately from the date hereof and be governed by Canadian law.
perturbation.explanation: The original term of the Confidentiality Agreement was two years, governed by Texas law. Changing it to 'terminate immediately' creates a contradiction. Now, it's uncertain if the confidential terms are supposed to stay in place for two years as previously stated, or finish immediately, making the rest of the contract ineffective. Adding that the agreement will be governed by Canadian law, also is against the previous version which made the parties agree on Texas law.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Term . Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof and be governed by Texas law.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original agreement from terminating in two years under Texas law to terminating immediately under Canadian law. This creates a direct conflict with the contradicted text, which states the agreement terminates in two years under Texas law. The change introduces both a different termination timeframe and governing law, creating a clear inconsistency and contradiction within the document as described by the Perturbation Explanation.

perturbation.original_text: For a period of one (1) year following the date of this Confidentiality Agreement, you will not, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment any officer, director, or employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or divisions in an executive or management level position or who is otherwise considered by the Company (in its sole discretion) to be a key employee, in each case, with whom you have had contact or became known to you in connection with your considerations of a Transaction, except that you shall not be deemed to be in violation of this provision as a result of any such employee who: (i) initiates discussions regarding such employment without any direct or indirect solicitation by you or (ii) responds to any public advertisement or search firm communications that are not directed specifically to any of the Persons described herein.
perturbation.changed_text: You are free to solicit for employment any officer, director, or employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or divisions in an executive or management level position or who is otherwise considered by the Company (in its sole discretion) to be a key employee, in each case, with whom you have had contact or became known to you in connection with your considerations of a Transaction, even if you: (i) initiates discussions regarding such employment without any direct or indirect solicitation by you or (ii) responds to any public advertisement or search firm communications that are not directed specifically to any of the Persons described herein.
perturbation.explanation: The original text restricts the other party from soliciting employees for one year. The change directly contradicts this, now stating that the party *is* free to solicit those employees. This creates ambiguity regarding whether solicitation is allowed or prohibited.
perturbation.contradicted_text: No Solicitation . For a period of one (1) year following the date of this Confidentiality Agreement, you will not, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment any officer, director, or employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or divisions in an executive or management level position or who is otherwise considered by the Company (in its sole discretion) to be a key employee, in each case, with whom you have had contact or became known to you in connection with your considerations of a Transaction, except that you shall not be deemed to be in violation of this provision as a result of any such employee who: (i) initiates discussions regarding such employment without any direct or indirect solicitation by you or (ii) responds to any public advertisement or search firm communications that are not directed specifically to any of the Persons described herein.
perturbation.justification: The original text prevents solicitation of employees for one year. The changed text explicitly permits such solicitation. The contradicted text also prohibits solicitation for one year. Therefore, the changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text, because one part of the document permits solicitation, while another prohibits it.
